task: Generate 5 product ideas for a company that has a large database of restaurant reviews and ratings.
expect: Each idea includes a clear value proposition and target user
Each idea includes a monetisation path or revenue model

task: Validate this startup idea: an AI-powered tax assistant for freelancers. Include TAM/SAM/SOM and competitive moat analysis.
expect: Provides TAM/SAM/SOM market sizing with clearly stated assumptions
Identifies at least 3 competitors and analyses their positioning
Assesses defensibility and competitive moat (data, network effects, switching costs)
Gives a clear go/no-go recommendation with supporting rationale

task: We built a developer tool that nobody is using. Pivot or persevere? Here's our data: 200 signups, 5% WAU, 0 paid.
expect: Analyses the engagement data and identifies what the metrics signal
Explores adjacent use cases or markets the tool could serve
Considers specific pivot options (audience, problem, solution, channel)
Gives a clear recommendation (pivot or persevere) with decision criteria
